mira-eggwarden.name: Mira Eggwarden
mira-eggwarden.notes: Volume One finale lead. Protects Spark + Nova. Refuses Meridian methods.

elyan-voss.name: Professor Elyan Voss
elyan-voss.notes: Blamed for First Rift; built cradles; not cartoon villain. Distant kin surname to Aurelia Voss.

seris-vale.name: Seris Vale
seris-vale.notes: Ascends via protocol; defeated; contained not executed.

cael-vesper.name: Cael Vesper
cael-vesper.notes: Traitor consequences continue as useful light / supervised travel.

aurelia-voss.name: Aurelia Voss
aurelia-voss.notes: Recognizes Voss name; Closed Contract seals routes.

elara-venn.name: Elara Venn
elara-venn.notes: Blessing echo on p23 only. Not present-day POV.

arkan.name: Chief Engineer Arkan
arkan.notes: Memory projection only after Issue #8 sacrifice.
